title: client_task: session fetch and initial data load
description:
## Why
Without a real connection the UI can only show placeholder data.

## What
- Call JmapChatClient::fetch_session(), send SessionFetched event
- Chat/query + Chat/get to load full chat list, send ChatsLoaded
- ChatContact/get to load contacts, send ContactsLoaded
- ReadPosition/get to load read positions
- PresenceStatus/get to load own status
- Error handling: send ConnectionError on any failure, allow reconnect
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
